message:
🐛 Fix AI workflow: delete existing branch before push

Delete any existing remote branch from previous failed runs
before creating a new fix branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,9 +92,13 @@ jobs:
           echo "$(npm bin -g)" >> $GITHUB_PATH
 
       - name: Create fix branch
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           git config user.name "Claude Code Bot"
           git config user.email "claude-bot@kubestellar.io"
+          # Delete existing remote branch if it exists (from previous failed runs)
+          git push origin --delete "ai-fix/issue-${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}" 2>/dev/null || true
           git checkout -b "ai-fix/issue-${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}"
 
       - name: Run Claude Code
